format:
<style>
body.nr-dashboard-theme md-content {
    background-color: #f4f7fb !important;
}

md-toolbar {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0f172a, #1d4ed8) !important;
    color: white !important;
}
md-toolbar .md-toolbar-tools {
    font-size: 24px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
}

.nr-dashboard-card {
    background: #ffffff !important;
    border-radius: 18px !important;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.10) !important;
    border: 1px solid #e5e7eb !important;
    padding: 8px !important;
}

.nr-dashboard-cardtitle {
    color: #1d4ed8 !important;
    font-size: 28px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    text-align: center !important;
    padding-top: 8px !important;
    padding-bottom: 8px !important;
}

.nr-dashboard-cardcontainer {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-direction: column !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    justify-content: flex-start !important;
}

.nr-dashboard-text,
.nr-dashboard-text p,
.nr-dashboard-text div,
.nr-dashboard-text span {
    text-align: center !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    color: #111827 !important;
}

label,
.nr-dashboard-gauge-title,
.nr-dashboard-cardcontainer md-card-content label {
    color: #111827 !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    text-align: center !important;
}

.nr-dashboard-gauge {
    display: flex !important;
    justify-content: center !important;
    align-items: center !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-gauge svg {
    display: block !important;
    margin: auto !important;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .value {
    font-weight: 800 !important;
    color: #0f172a !important;
}

.nr-dashboard-card:nth-of-type(1) {
    border-top: 5px solid #2563eb !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-card:nth-of-type(2) {
    border-top: 5px solid #16a34a !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-card:nth-of-type(3) {
    border-top: 5px solid #ea580c !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-card:nth-of-type(4) {
    border-top: 5px solid #7c3aed !important;
}

pre {
    font-family: Consolas, monospace !important;
    font-size: 15px !important;
    color: #0f172a !important;
}

strong, b {
    font-weight: 800 !important;
}

.value-blue {
    color: #2563eb !important;
    font-weight: 800 !important;
    font-size: 28px !important;
}

.value-green {
    color: #16a34a !important;
    font-weight: 800 !important;
    font-size: 26px !important;
}

.value-red {
    color: #dc2626 !important;
    font-weight: 800 !important;
    font-size: 22px !important;
}

.value-purple {
    color: #7c3aed !important;
    font-weight: 800 !important;
    font-size: 24px !important;
}

.value-dark {
    color: #0f172a !important;
    font-weight: 800 !important;
    font-size: 22px !important;
}

.sdr-highlight .nr-dashboard-cardtitle {
    color: #7c3aed !important;
}
</style>
